title: Land beyond Bananas
description: This is apecraft 2 which adds bananas, dimensions, primates, monkeys, and more
body: After a few months of apecraft being discontinued, we bring you a much more detailed bigger version of apecraft. This time we bring you a whole new dimension with 4 new biomes and 7 new mobs. To make it to banana land you must make a nether portal formation with raw gold and you can light it with a banana eye. This is only an alpha and was only made by 2 people, so keep in mind many of the textures aren’t final. We put a lot of work into the mod so we hope you enjoy!
